claim: QCon London 2026 runs Mar 16-19 at the QEII Centre, targeting senior engineers, architects and tech leads with 75+ peer-selected speakers across 15 curated tracks.
quote: QCon London is a software development conference for senior software engineers, software architects, tech leads, and engineering managers in Europe.

claim: QCon London 2026 tracks cover AI Engineering, Architectures You've Always Wondered About, Building Engineering Teams, Tech of Finance, Distributed Systems, Resilience, Performance and Staff+ Leadership.
quote: QCon London 2026 will bring together 75+ peer-selected speakers across 15 curated tracks ... AI adoption, resilient architectures, distributed systems, performance, modern languages, data, security, and Staff+ leadership.

claim: GOTO Copenhagen 2026 runs Sep 28 - Oct 2 at TAP1 with the tagline 'Engineering for Reality—Craft software with confidence in the age of AI'; expected ~1,200 attendees, themes span concurrency, distributed systems, observability, sustainability and agentic software development.
quote: Engineering for Reality—Craft software with confidence in the age of AI. You ship it, you own it, you maintain it.

claim: GOTO Copenhagen is the only European GOTO-branded conference on the 2026 calendar (no GOTO Aarhus or GOTO Amsterdam scheduled for 2026).
quote: GOTO Copenhagen 2026 - Copenhagen, Denmark (Sep 28 - Oct 2, 2026)

claim: Devoxx Belgium 2026 takes place Oct 5-9 at Kinepolis Antwerp, organised in nine tracks: Java, GenAI & Beyond, Architecture, Security, Server Side Java, Dev. Practices, People & Culture, Build Different and Mind The Geek.
quote: Devoxx Belgium 2026 will take place from Monday October 5th until Friday the 9th in Antwerp, Belgium at the renowned Kinepolis Antwerpen.

claim: Devoxx Belgium 2026 ticket prices: Conference (3 days) €695, Deep-Dive (2 days) €445, Combi (5 days) €995 — all excluding 21% VAT; first registration batch opens August 17 at 09:00 CEST.
quote: Conference Ticket (3 days): 695 EUR ... Deep-Dive Ticket (2 days): 445 EUR ... Combi Ticket (5 days): 995 EUR

claim: NDC Oslo 2026 runs 14-18 September at Oslo Spektrum, with 160 sessions, 150 speakers and 15 workshops on the agenda.
quote: NDC Oslo 2026 ... 14-18 September 2026 ... Oslo Spektrum ... 160 Sessions (Currently Booking) ... 150 speakers and 15 workshops

claim: NDC Oslo 2026 early-bird prices (ends 22 May): All Access Pass NOK 22,490; 3-Day Conference Pass NOK 16,490; 2-Day Workshop Pass NOK 14,490 — all + 25% MVA.
quote: All Access Pass: 22,490 ... 3-Day Conference Pass: 16,490 ... 25% MVA (VAT/TAX) will be added to all ticket types

claim: NDC Copenhagen 2026 runs 1-4 June 2026 as part of the NDC family of developer conferences (Oslo, Copenhagen, London, Porto, Sydney).
quote: NDC Conferences ... Oslo, Copenhagen, London, Porto and Sydney

claim: Craft Conference 2026 takes place June 4-5 at the Hungarian Railway Museum in Budapest.
quote: Craft - Budapest, June 4-5, 2026

claim: Craft 2026 keynote and speaker line-up includes Gergely Orosz and other senior practitioners; early-bird tickets are available.
quote: Craft 2026: Gergely Orosz & more speakers announced

claim: WeAreDevelopers World Congress runs July 8-10 2026 in Berlin (CityCube), expecting 15,000+ developers, 500+ speakers and a 40,000 sqm tech expo across themes including AI engineering, modern architecture, cloud/DevOps, security and leadership.
quote: 15,000+ developers, 8,000+ companies represented, 2,000 decision-makers, 500+ speakers ... 40,000+ SQM tech expo

claim: WeAreDevelopers World Congress 2026 ticket pricing: €490 early bird, €579 regular, €799 standard.
quote: €490 (early bird); regular €579; standard pricing €799

claim: Øredev 2026 runs November 4-6 in Malmö and celebrates the conference's 20th edition.
quote: Øredev 2026 is a Software Developers Conference taking place on November 4-6th in Malmö, Sweden. In 2026, the conference celebrates 20 years of Øredev.

claim: Øredev attracts 1,200+ attendees over 3 days each November in Malmö, with 100+ sessions on 8 stages covering programming through project management, and an explicit emphasis on diversity and inclusion.
quote: 1200+ visitors during 3 days at the beginning of November ... over 100 sessions by top-notch speakers from all over the world giving talks on 8 stages

claim: Build Stuff 2026 runs December 2-4 at Radisson Blu Hotel Lietuva in Vilnius, billed as 'the #1 Software Development Conference in the Baltics'.
quote: Build Stuff 2026 will take place in Vilnius, Lithuania on December 2-4, 2026. The venue is Radisson Blu Hotel Lietuva in Vilnius.

claim: DevDays Europe 2026 runs May 19-22 in Vilnius (workshops at Simbiocity Nova, conference at Forum Cinemas Vingis); 700+ attendees from 35+ countries, 52% senior-level; 3-day onsite €1,150 + VAT, 4-day full €1,510 + VAT.
quote: 700+ attendees from 35+ countries, with 52% at senior level ... 3-day onsite: €1,150 (excl. VAT) ... 4-day full ticket: €1,510

claim: FOSDEM 2026 takes place 31 January - 1 February at ULB Solbosch Campus, Brussels; ~8,000 attendees, free, no registration required.
quote: FOSDEM 2026: 31st January and 1st February ... ULB Solbosch Campus, Brussels, Belgium ... 8000+ hackers

claim: FOSDEM is free to attend with no registration required and is one of Europe's largest open-source developer gatherings.
quote: FOSDEM is free to attend and there is no registration required.

claim: DDD Europe 2026 (Domain-Driven Design Europe) runs June 8-12 in Antwerp (workshops 8-10, conference 10-12) for architects, software engineers, emerging practitioners and engineering leadership; topics include strategic design, event-driven architectures and socio-technical systems.
quote: DDD Europe 2026 will be held in Antwerp, Belgium, with workshops June 8-9-10 and conference June 10-11-12, 2026.

claim: JavaZone 2026 runs September 2-3 at NOVA Spektrum in Lillestrøm (Oslo region) with 100+ speakers; the community-driven Java conference draws 2,000+ participants annually.
quote: JavaZone 2026 - the biggest community-driven Java conference

claim: JFokus 2026 takes place February 2-4 at the Stockholm Waterfront Congress Centre; tickets SEK 3,995 - 8,990; covers Java, JVM languages, GenAI, frontend, DevOps, cloud and Agile.
quote: Dates: February 2-4, 2026 ... Venue: Stockholm Waterfront Congress Centre ... Ticket Price: SEK 3,995 – 8,990

claim: Spring I/O 2026 takes place April 13-15 at Palau de Congressos de Catalunya, Barcelona, gathering 1,200+ Spring professionals around Spring Boot 4, Spring Framework 7 and Spring AI.
quote: Spring I/O • 13-15 • April • Barcelona 2026 ... gather more than 1200 Spring professionals

claim: Code BEAM Europe 2026 takes place 21-22 October at the Philharmonic in Haarlem, Netherlands (plus virtual), preceded by a hands-on training day on 20 October; covers Erlang, Elixir and Gleam.
quote: Code BEAM Europe 2026 - 21-22 OCT Haarlem & Online ... Erlang, Elixir and Gleam conference

claim: Industry comparison: 'QCon is more aimed at big corporate businesses, while GOTO is more aimed at techies'; QCon London uses an invitation-led CFP whereas GOTO has a more open CFP.
quote: QCon is more aimed at big corporate businesses, while GOTO is more aimed at techies. Additionally, GOTO has a more open call for papers (CFP), while QCon London has a CFP that tends to be done by invitation.

claim: Voxxed Days is a satellite series of community-run Devoxx-affiliated single-day events spread across Europe; 2026 editions include Ticino (Feb 6), Zürich (Mar 24), Bucharest (Apr 28-29), and others.
quote: Voxxed Days Ticino 2026 - Friday, February 6th, 2026 ... Voxxed Days Zürich 2026 - Tuesday, March 24th, 2026 ... Voxxed Days Bucharest 2026 - April 28-29, 2026

claim: Industry round-up positions WeAreDevelopers as 'one of the largest developer conferences in Europe' with high-quality content despite size, and Devoxx as a stronghold for the Java/JVM senior community.
quote: WeAreDevelopers is one of the largest developer conferences in Europe, but it manages to maintain high-quality content despite its size, with excellent speaker selection featuring a good mix of industry veterans and rising stars.

claim: QCon London 2026 conference tickets are priced in GBP excluding 20% UK VAT; PayPal and major credit cards accepted; team discounts available for groups of 3+.
quote: All amounts are stated in Great British Pound Sterling (GBP/£), with prices quoted excluding VAT or Sales tax. In-Person Conference Tickets are subject to UK VAT: 20% VAT will be added at purchase.
